title: Improving health intelligence in ChatGPT
author: openai-blog
raw_description: Learn how GPT-5.5 Instant improves ChatGPT’s health and wellness responses with stronger reasoning, better context, clearer communication, and physician-informed evaluations.
summary: OpenAI 通过 GPT-5.5 Instant 提升 ChatGPT 在健康领域的推理、上下文理解、沟通清晰度，并引入医生评估机制，增强健康智能响应。
analysis_note: 聚焦健康领域应用改进，技术细节有限，但具有实际价值，评分中等偏上。
